mapper.select: SELECT A1.ESNTL_ID , COALESCE( A1.USER_ID , '' ) AS USER_ID , COALESCE( DECRYPT(A1.USER_NM) , '' ) AS USER_NM , COALESCE( DECRYPT(A1.EMAIL_ADRES) , '' ) AS EMAIL_ADRES , COALESCE( DECRYPT(A1.USR_TELNO) , '' ) AS USR_TELNO , COALESCE( FN_MASK_PHONE(DECRYPT(A1.MBTLNUM),'N') , '' ) AS MBTLNUM , COALESCE( A1.MBER_STTUS , '' ) AS MBER_STTUS , COALESCE(DATE_FORMAT(A1.SBSCRB_DE, '%Y-%m-%d') , '' ) AS SBSCRB_DE , COALESCE(DATE_FORMAT(A1.SECSN_DE, '%Y-%m-%d') , '' ) AS SECSN_DE , COALESCE( A1.LOCK_LAST_PNTTM , '' ) AS LOCK_LAST_PNTTM , COALESCE( A1.LOCK_AT , 'N') AS LOCK_AT , COALESCE( A1.GROUP_ID , 'N') AS GROUP_ID FROM ARMUSER A1 WHERE A1.esntl_id = #{esntlId}
SELECT SCRTY_DTRMN_TRGET_ID , MBER_TY_CODE , AUTHOR_CODE FROM COMTNEMPLYRSCRTYESTBS WHERE SCRTY_DTRMN_TRGET_ID = #{esntlId}

SELECT A1.ESNTL_ID , COALESCE( A1.SEQ , '' ) AS seq , COALESCE( A1.WORK_GBN , '' ) AS WORK_GBN , COALESCE(DATE_FORMAT(A1.START_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d') , '' ) AS START_DATE , COALESCE(DATE_FORMAT(A1.END_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d') , '' ) AS END_DATE , COALESCE( A1.WORK_NM , '' ) AS WORK_NM , COALESCE( A1.DEGREE , '' ) AS degree , CASE WHEN DATE_FORMAT(A1.END_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d') = '9999-12-31' THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END AS DEGREE_PERIOD FROM ARMWORK A1 WHERE A1.esntl_id = #{esntlId} AND A1.WORK_GBN = #{workGbn}

SELECT A1.ESNTL_ID , COALESCE( A1.SEQ , '' ) AS seq , COALESCE(DATE_FORMAT(A1.GET_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d') , '' ) AS GET_DATE , COALESCE( A1.LICE_NM , '' ) AS LICE_NM , COALESCE( A1.LICE_NO , '' ) AS LICE_NO , COALESCE( A1.COMP_NM , '' ) AS COMP_NM FROM ARMLICE A1 WHERE A1.ESNTL_ID = #{esntlId}

SELECT A1.ESNTL_ID , COALESCE( A1.SEQ , '' ) AS seq , COALESCE( A1.WORK_GBN , '' ) AS WORK_GBN , COALESCE(DATE_FORMAT(A1.START_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d') , '' ) AS START_DATE , COALESCE(DATE_FORMAT(A1.END_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d') , '' ) AS END_DATE , COALESCE( A1.WORK_NM , '' ) AS WORK_NM , COALESCE( A1.POSITION , '' ) AS POSITION , COALESCE( A1.WORK_DESC , '' ) AS WORK_DESC , CASE WHEN DATE_FORMAT(A1.END_DATE, '%Y-%m-%d') = '9999-12-31' THEN 'N' ELSE 'Y' END AS CAREER_PERIOD FROM ARMWORK A1 WHERE A1.esntl_id = #{esntlId} AND A1.WORK_GBN = #{workGbn}
mapper.update:
UPDATE ARMUSER SET USER_ID = #{userId} , user_nm = ENCRYPT(#{userNm})
, password = #{newPw} , CHG_PWD_LAST_PNTTM = now()
, USR_TELNO = ENCRYPT(REPLACE( #{usrTelno} , '-', '' )) , MBTLNUM = ENCRYPT(REPLACE( #{mbtlnum} , '-', '' )) , EMAIL_ADRES = ENCRYPT(#{emailAdres}) , MBER_STTUS = #{mberSttus} , SBSCRB_DE =
#{sbscrbDe}
NULL
, SECSN_DE = NOW()
, SECSN_DE = NULL
, LOCK_AT = #{lockAt} , LOCK_CNT = 5 , LOCK_LAST_PNTTM = NOW()
, LOCK_AT = NULL , LOCK_CNT = NULL , LOCK_LAST_PNTTM = NULL
, GROUP_ID = #{groupId} , CHG_LAST_DT = now() WHERE esntl_id = #{esntlId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM ( SELECT ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY A.VACA_YEAR DESC) AS RNUM , COALESCE( A.ESNTL_ID , '' ) AS ESNTL_ID , COALESCE( A.VACA_YEAR , '' ) AS VACA_YEAR , COALESCE( A.VACA_DAY , '' ) AS VACA_DAY FROM ARMVACA A WHERE ESNTL_ID = #{esntlId} ) A1
select A1.GROUP_ID , A1.GROUP_NM , A1.GROUP_DC from lettnauthorgroupinfo as a1 where GROUP_ID != 'GROUP_00000000000001'
mapper.update: UPDATE ARMUSER SET MBER_STTUS = 'D' , SECSN_DE = NOW() , CHG_LAST_DT = NOW() WHERE ESNTL_ID = #{esntlId}
